description_long: This is a sturdy, rectangular wooden table with a rustic appearance, featuring a thick tabletop composed of three wide planks running lengthwise. The wood surface is marked with visible grain patterns and subtle reddish stains, giving it a weathered, well-used look. The table is supported by four robust, straight legs positioned at each corner, providing stability and a classic silhouette. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or additional features, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The finish is matte and slightly rough, suggesting it is built for durability in high-traffic environments. Its proportions and construction make it suitable for communal or public use, such as in parks, outdoor seating areas, or urban gathering spots.
description: A rustic, rectangular wooden table with a thick plank top and four sturdy legs, featuring a weathered, matte finish and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow side of the table and two of its legs, highlighting the thickness of the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tabletop, all four legs, and the plank construction of the surface.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the other narrow side and two legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same full-length perspective and visible plank details.
